{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Elder worms
| introduced = ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers
}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Elder worms]] haunt the beach.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c10">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|There are about a thousand squirming [[Elder worms]] on the deck with [[Calder]] and [[Jerri]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c24">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 24</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|“Now, see here. Even if we board my ship, how do we clear these worms that haunt the beach?”<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c10" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire concepts]]
[[Category:Lifeforms]]
